_comment: Tydro on Ink mainnet (chainId 57073). Only the addressesProvider, dataProvider and oracleMigrationTarget are read by scripts/tests; pool/configurator/oracle/aclManager/aclAdmin are DERIVED at runtime from the provider and listed here for reference only. All values verified on-chain at the pinned fork block.

_abi_hints._comment: Reference only — NOT read by scripts/tests. Human-readable signatures for ad-hoc `cast` against the running fork, e.g. `cast call $POOL 'getReservesList()(address[])'`. Full Solidity interfaces live in src/interfaces/IAaveV3.sol; this is intentionally a small cast cheat-sheet, not a duplicated ABI.

seed._comment: Position-book seeding (ForkBase.seedPositionBook). Read by scripts/tests; overridable per-key via SEED_* env vars; unset/zero fails loudly. Collateral is oracleMigrationTarget. borrowAsset defaults to USDC (deep, borrowing-enabled stable). lp/borrower1/borrower2 are anvil accounts #1/#2/#3 (public test keys) — deliberately NOT the candidate's account 0. HFs are basis points (10000 = 1.0): one comfortable, one near the edge.
